pressure_range_low.description: Lower bound of the range of individual football inflation pressures, used to approximate σ via R/4.

pressure_range_high.description: Upper bound of the range of individual football inflation pressures, used to approximate σ via R/4.

confidence_level.description: Desired confidence level (99%) for the confidence interval.

sampling_error.description: Desired maximum sampling error (margin of error) of 0.025 pound.
